description: You are a crop scout for AgriScan Field Services. Create a professional scouting report in Apache OpenOffice Writer for 'Valley View Dairy' using the data found in /home/ga/Documents/field_data.json and save it as /home/ga/Documents/ValleyView_Alfalfa_Report_June2025.odt. The document must include a header with the text 'AgriScan Field Services - Scouting Report' and a footer with page numbers. Organize the report with Heading 1 sections for 'Field Information' (listing Client, Field ID, Crop, and Stage), 'Observations' (containing a table with columns for Pest Name, Count, Threshold, and Status), and 'Recommendations' (detailing the Action Plan, including Product and Rate if a chemical is listed). For safety compliance, ensure the Restricted Entry Interval (REI) value is formatted in bold text.
